title: Rauch Gertenbach: The best in Mossel Bay
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you Mossel Bay, for...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you Mossel Bay, for supporting Rauch Gertenbach Attorneys’ legacy of winning, to again bring home the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice award for Best Attorneys.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you Mossel Bay, for supporting Rauch Gertenbach Attorneys’ legacy of winning, to again bring home the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice award for Best Attorneys."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the saying goes: “It is a Coming of age”, and in addition to numerous previous awards, being named the best attorney / law firm in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice award, once again by public vote, is a testimony to our 103 years of legal excellence, our competent legal practitioners and committed staff, serving the greater Mossel Bay community (and the greater Garden Route).","html":"As the saying goes: “It is a Coming of age”, and in addition to numerous previous awards, being named the best attorney / law firm in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice award, once again by public vote, is a testimony to our 103 years of legal excellence, our competent legal practitioners and committed staff, serving the greater Mossel Bay community (and the greater Garden Route)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This award is not only for the current directors and staff, but also the many attorneys and staff who have graced the corridors of our firm, building a strong history and laying the foundation for the Rauch Gertenbach legacy and success.","html":"This award is not only for the current directors and staff, but also the many attorneys and staff who have graced the corridors of our firm, building a strong history and laying the foundation for the Rauch Gertenbach legacy and success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUR VISION“To be the preferred supplier of legal and related services in the Southern Cape.”","html":"OUR VISION
“To be the preferred supplier of legal and related services in the Southern Cape.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUR MISSION“To deliver quality legal and related services according to every client’s needs.”","html":"OUR MISSION
“To deliver quality legal and related services according to every client’s needs.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUR VALUES","html":"OUR VALUES"},{"type":"list","items":["Professionalism","Integrity","Effectiveness","Excellence","Loyalty"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"THANK YOU!The heartbeat of our firm is the 50 loyal staff members, ranging from our four directors and eight specialist professional staff, all the way through to our most junior personnel.","html":"THANK YOU!
The heartbeat of our firm is the 50 loyal staff members, ranging from our four directors and eight specialist professional staff, all the way through to our most junior personnel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through the years our predominantly female support staff have proven to be the glue that keeps the firm together, providing the platform from which the directors can lead and build success. We are very proud of our staff and thank them endlessly for their dedication and hard work.","html":"Through the years our predominantly female support staff have proven to be the glue that keeps the firm together, providing the platform from which the directors can lead and build success. We are very proud of our staff and thank them endlessly for their dedication and hard work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The responses from you, our clients, who gave us your vote of confidence throughout this endeavour, have been truly humbling. The firm cannot exist without its loyal client base.","html":"The responses from you, our clients, who gave us your vote of confidence throughout this endeavour, have been truly humbling. The firm cannot exist without its loyal client base."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for sticking with us through all the years amidst increased competition. We will continue to serve you to the best of our ability - and may we all have many more successful years together!","html":"Thank you for sticking with us through all the years amidst increased competition. We will continue to serve you to the best of our ability - and may we all have many more successful years together!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lastly, our hearty congratulations to all the other winners and nominees who took part in this grand initiative!"},{"type":"list","items":["044 601 9900","[email protected]","www.rgprok.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
